settings.name: Noah Lucas
settings.heroPhrase: I turn frontier technology into trusted products that work in the real world.
settings.subtext: Product leadership across strategy, systems, and commercialization for physical AI, autonomy, and mission-critical data infrastructure.
settings.methods: First principles · Systems thinking · Customer obsession
settings.skills: Product strategy · Customer discovery · Roadmaps · Product operations · GTM · Team leadership
settings.expertise: Physical AI · Autonomy · Telemetry · Edge and DDIL systems · Developer platforms

employers.oneLiner: Telemetry and observability infrastructure for teams building complex machines.
employers.jtbd: Turn fragmented machine telemetry into decision-ready workflows across test, manufacturing, and live operations.
employers.workflows: Customer discovery · telemetry review · manufacturing validation · live operations · AI-assisted analysis · roadmap and engineering cadence.
employers.impact: Owned the product strategy and operating cadence connecting customer signal, founder vision, engineering constraints, GTM, and deployment.

employers.oneLiner: Defense technology building autonomous systems for the United States and its allies.
employers.jtbd: Give autonomy and mission teams reliable geospatial intelligence across edge, mapping, simulation, and mixed-reality environments.
employers.workflows: Customer and engineering requirements · roadmap strategy · data licensing · partner strategy · deployment feedback · governance.
employers.impact: Negotiated strategic partnerships with Vantor, Blackshark.ai, and TCarta; reduced vendor spend by approximately $3M.

employers.oneLiner: Applied AI company developing resilient navigation and geolocation systems.
employers.jtbd: Translate DoD-funded R&D into a usable GPS-denied geolocation product combining sensors, geospatial context, and neural networks.
employers.workflows: Research synthesis · customer workflows · product requirements · prototype validation · field-test loops · adoption paths.
employers.impact: Validated prototypes in electronic-attack field exercises at White Sands.

employers.oneLiner: Autonomous sidewalk delivery platform commercializing last-mile robotics.
employers.jtbd: Turn L4 sidewalk autonomy into a reliable commercial product for delivery partners and fleet operators.
employers.workflows: Fleet reliability · autonomy performance · partner APIs · command and control · GTM · partner expansion.
employers.impact: Integrated Serve with Uber and helped unlock the 2,000+ robot Uber Eats expansion.

employers.oneLiner: On-demand logistics marketplace and delivery infrastructure platform.
employers.jtbd: Build the products and operating infrastructure needed to scale a marketplace into a global delivery platform.
employers.workflows: Customer-service automation and Zendesk · product-operations infrastructure · internationalization · developer platform · B2B integrations.
employers.impact: Built the B2B platform from zero to $12M ARR and approximately 30% of delivery volume; launched the first non-domestic market and same-day delivery integrations with Apple and Walmart.

employers.oneLiner: Global travel marketplace for flights, lodging, cars, and trip management.
employers.jtbd: Make travel booking and trip management work globally on mobile.
employers.workflows: Mobile product strategy · flights · itineraries · rental cars · localization · international growth.
employers.impact: Launched rental cars as a global mobile line of business and led mobile growth across APAC and EMEA.

employers.employer: S&P Global Market Intelligence / Capital IQ
employers.oneLiner: Financial intelligence platform for research, data, and investment workflows.
employers.jtbd: Make high-volume financial-data collection and operations fast, reliable, and usable for research customers.
employers.workflows: UX and requirements · near-real-time collection · data pipelines · workflow tooling · data-operations systems.
employers.impact: Defined the product experience and operating requirements for near-real-time financial-data collection and workflow tooling.
